_comment: alpha/beta/gamma/delta feed icp_fit_scorer.compute_icp_fit (regex / weighted_total*evidence / segment_fit / persona_fit). semantic_weight blends pgvector cosine on top of the ICP composite when icp_analysis is present: final = (1-semantic_weight)*icp_composite + semantic_weight*cosine. semantic_weight_regex is used on the regex-only path: final = (1-semantic_weight_regex)*regex + semantic_weight_regex*cosine. See backend/leadgen_agent/icp_fit_scorer.py and backend/leadgen_agent/company_enrichment_graph.py.
